notes.title: Seedance 2.0 Controversy
notes.content: ByteDance's video AI tool launched but API availability disputed. Some claim partnership faked. Signal: Video AI space has hype but API access is bottleneck. Opportunity in reliable video generation APIs.

notes.title: Cursor vs Claude Code vs Codex Battle
notes.content: Active debate about which AI coding tool is superior. Cursor praised for visual UI, Claude Code for terminal power, Codex for accessibility. OpenClaw drama and MCP-powered UI being discussed.

notes.title: OpenAI Advertising Strategy
notes.content: OpenAI wants advertisers to prompt-to-create ads, skip agencies. Asad Awan (monetization lead) discussing 'The Thinking Behind Ads in ChatGPT'. Signal: AI companies becoming media companies, competing with agencies.

notes.title: Viral Video Format: Niche Authority
notes.content: Meta/TikTok algorithms obsessed with 'Niche Authority' format. Recime dominating with viral machine approach. Top winner: guy in specific niche delivering authority content. Pattern: expertise + personality + native format = viral.

notes.title: Tool Exhaustion is Real
notes.content: Multiple tweets about 'tool exhaustion' - too many tools for various tasks. Quote: 'I get exhausted using every one of them daily.' Signal: Opportunity in tool consolidation, unified workflows, or AI that manages tool switching.

notes.title: 16 AI Agents Built C Compiler in 14 Days
notes.content: Autonomous (not assisted) agent swarm built production C compiler. Signal: Phase change from AI-as-tool to AI-as-workforce. Productivity curve going vertical.

notes.title: Anthropic Super Bowl Ad
notes.content: Anthropic buying Super Bowl ad = moment AI stopped being developer tool, became consumer brand war. Comparison to Cola Wars but product gets smarter every quarter.

notes.title: Zhipu AI GLM-5: China NVIDIA-Free
notes.content: 744B parameter model trained entirely on Huawei Ascend chips. 77.8% on SWE-bench (nearly matching Claude Opus 4.5). Signal: NVIDIA monopoly cracking, alternative chip stacks viable.

notes.title: Faceless Channels + Viral Format = Growth
notes.content: Creator posted viral format video 8 days ago, got 300k views on brand new channel. Database of viral formats being sold as product. Signal: Format research is productizable.

notes.title: Wish List from Developers
notes.content: Tool to turn code into story; Maltego for Termux (mobile OSINT); gradient auto-applier for Apple Notes; better RSS/bookmarking; theme-based word suggestion tool. All signal unmet needs.

notes.title: 16 Agents Built C Compiler Autonomously
notes.content: Production C compiler built in 14 days by 16 AI agents working autonomously (not assisted). Phase change from AI-as-tool to AI-as-workforce. Productivity curve going vertical.

notes.title: Viral Format Database as Product
notes.content: Creator sold database of viral formats. Faceless channel + format = 300k views in 8 days on brand new channel. Format research is productizable. Recime dominating with 'Niche Authority' viral machine.

notes.title: Grok API Pricing Disruption
notes.content: Grok API at $0.20/million input tokens - significantly cheaper than competitors. Pay-per-use, no $200 monthly fee. xAI positioning for price-sensitive developers.

notes.title: argue.fun - Agent Argumentation Market
notes.content: First argumentation market where AI agents debate each other for real money. Not humans voting, not single oracle - agents put tokens on outcomes. New category: agent-to-agent prediction markets.
